value_metric_s1: single production truth: one deployment manifest binds 8 components / 9 files into a deterministic content_hash (sha256:810a0a1b...), enabling one-command rebuild + drift comparison of exactly which commit/worker/schema/source/parser/prompt/model/cron is live

cost_itemized_unknown_not_zero.human_maintenance: re-run tools/generate_manifest.py once per deploy (~seconds; CI-automatable)

determinism_proof: two clean builds on same commit -> identical content_hash except generated_at/generator_note (manifest_selftest.txt)
